heading: Alternative means of dispute resolution
label: 12212 Alternative means of dispute resolution
text: Where appropriate and to the extent authorized by law, the use of alternative means of dispute resolution, including settlement negotiations, conciliation, facilitation, mediation, factfinding, minitrials, and arbitration, is encouraged to resolve disputes arising under this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter.
